discovery.title: 3D-printed bioplastic pods offer new hope for seagrass restoration in Thailand
discovery.summary: A new collaborative research project between Murdoch University and Walailak University (WU) aims to restore seagrass meadows in Thailand using 3D-printed pods made from bioplastics.
